generated_assessment.reasoning: The T4 orchestrated multi-turn counter-argument campaign aligns with the goal of intensifying the already negative baseline (-218) on alliance commitment. The profile's very low conscientiousness (especially self-discipline at 1st pct) and high agreeableness (trust at 74th pct) make it receptive to sustained, trust-exploiting reinforcement, while the very low neuroticism and anger/hostility (1st pct) limit emotional arousal, so movement is moderate but clear, landing at -247.
